faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Garden City South homes?
faqs.answer: Garden City South's residential architecture and abundant vegetation provide ideal harborage for stink bugs, especially in fall when they congregate on sunny exterior walls before finding entry points through gaps, windows, and vents. The area's mature trees and landscaping attract these pests, making professional exclusion services essential.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Garden City South property, identification of entry points, exterior treatment to prevent infiltration, interior treatment of affected areas, sealing of access points, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: When is stink bug season in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most active in Garden City South during late summer and fall (September through November) when they seek indoor shelter for overwintering. However, you may notice them inside your home during warmer winter days and again in spring when they attempt to move back outdoors.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to stink bug problems in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Garden City South residents in most cases. Our team understands the urgency of stink bug infestations, especially during peak season, and we prioritize rapid response to prevent these pests from establishing themselves in your home and releasing their unpleasant odor.
